values.title: Mindful Practice
values.description: Classes rooted in ancient traditions, adapted for modern life with emphasis on breath and presence.

values.title: Holistic Wellness
values.description: Beyond asana: meditation, pranayama, and lifestyle guidance for total well-being.

values.title: Expert Instructors
values.description: Certified teachers with 500+ hours of training and years of dedicated practice.

values.title: Beautiful Studio
values.description: Naturally lit, heated studio spaces designed to nurture your practice.

values.title: Retreat Experiences
values.description: Transformative retreats in stunning locations around the world.

values.title: All Levels Welcome
values.description: From first-timers to advanced practitioners, every class meets you where you are.

values.title: Serene Flow Yoga
values.hero_description: A welcoming studio dedicated to mindful movement, deep breathing, and inner peace for every body and every level.
values.cta_description: Your first class is free. Experience the transformative power of yoga in a supportive, inclusive space.

values.title: Vinyasa Flow
values.body:
A dynamic, breath-synchronized practice linking poses in a flowing sequence. Builds strength, flexibility, and focus.

Class Highlights

Creative sequencing with options for all levels. Expect sun salutations, standing poses, inversions, and a long savasana.

values.title: Yin Yoga
values.body:
A slow, meditative practice holding poses for 3-5 minutes to target deep connective tissues. Perfect complement to active practices.

Benefits

Increases flexibility, releases fascia, calms the nervous system, and cultivates patience and stillness.

values.title: Power Yoga
values.body:
An athletic, strength-building practice inspired by Ashtanga. Vigorous flows that challenge your body and sharpen your mind.

What to Expect

Core work, arm balances, and challenging transitions in a heated room. Bring water and a towel.

values.title: Restorative Yoga
values.body:
Deeply relaxing practice using props to support the body in gentle poses held for extended periods. Activates the parasympathetic nervous system.

Perfect For

Stress relief, recovery from illness or injury, and anyone seeking deep rest and renewal.
values.schedule: Wed 12:00 PM, Fri 7:00 PM, Sun 5:00 PM

values.title: Maya Patel
values.body: Maya has been practicing yoga for over 15 years and teaching for 10. She trained in Rishikesh, India, and weaves philosophy, breathwork, and mindful movement into every class.

values.title: James Wu
values.body: James brings a background in physical therapy to his teaching. His classes emphasize alignment, injury prevention, and accessible modifications for all bodies.

values.title: Elena Rossi
values.body: Elena is a dynamic power yoga teacher who blends Ashtanga tradition with creative sequencing. Her classes are challenging, playful, and deeply empowering.

values.title: Bali Bliss Retreat
values.body:
Immerse yourself in 7 days of yoga, meditation, and Balinese culture. Practice twice daily in an open-air shala overlooking rice terraces.

Includes

  • 14 yoga sessions
  • Daily meditation
  • Organic meals
  • Temple visit and cultural excursions
  • Luxury villa accommodation

values.title: Sedona Soul Retreat
values.body:
A transformative weekend in Arizona's red rock country. Combine yoga, hiking, and energy work in one of the world's most powerful landscapes.

Includes

  • 6 yoga sessions
  • 2 guided hikes
  • Sound healing ceremony
  • Farm-to-table meals

values.title: Costa Rica Renewal
values.body:
10 days of deep practice in the Costa Rican rainforest. Morning vinyasa, afternoon yin, evening meditation, and surf lessons available.

Includes

  • 20 yoga sessions
  • Rainforest excursions
  • Surf lessons
  • Organic meals
  • Beachfront bungalow

values.title: About Serene Flow Yoga
values.body:
Serene Flow Yoga was founded in 2018 with a vision of creating an inclusive, welcoming space where the ancient practice of yoga could meet modern life.

Our Philosophy

We believe yoga is for every body. Our classes honor tradition while embracing innovation, making the practice accessible and relevant.

Our Space

Our studio features naturally lit practice rooms, a meditation garden, and a boutique carrying sustainable yoga gear and wellness products.

values.title: FAQ
values.body:
I've never done yoga. Where do I start?

Our Beginner Vinyasa and Restorative classes are perfect starting points. No experience needed.

What should I wear?

Comfortable clothing you can move freely in. We practice barefoot.

Do I need my own mat?

We have mats, blocks, straps, and blankets available. Feel free to bring your own.

Can I drop in or do I need a membership?

Both! Drop-in classes are $22, or choose from our monthly membership plans.
